LAW AND MOTION, 302, JUDGMENT DEBTOR DANIEL ZHENG'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT TRACED ANY PAID EARNINGS INTO DEPOSIT ACCOUNTS. (CCP 704.070(B).) JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THE LEVIED FUNDS ARE NECESSARY FOR THE SUPPORT OF THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR OR HIS PARENTS. THEIR COMBINED MONTHLY INCOME EXCEEDS THEIR MONTHLY EXPENSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976. (302)

attorneys.name: MIELE, KENNETH J.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., 510.985.9250, specially appearing for plaintiff/judgment creditor Unifund CCR, LLC.
Daniel Zheng, defendant/judgment debtor in propria persona.

RULING: No argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judgment Debtor Daniel Zheng's Claim Of Exemption is denied. Judgment Debtor has not traced any paid earnings into deposit accounts. (CCP 704.070(b).) Judgment Debtor has not demonstrated the levied funds are necessary for the support of the judgment debtor or his parents. Their combined monthly income exceeds their monthly expenses. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
